articles.title: SEC loses bid to classify BNB secondary sales as securities
articles.description: The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) lost its bid to classify sales of BNB, Binances native token, on secondary markets, and the Binance USD (BUSD) stablecoin as securities, according to a court filing signed by Judge Amy Berman Jackson on June 28.The court referenced Judge Analisa Torres' 2023 ruling in the SEC vs. Ripple Labs case to dismiss the secondary BNB sales claim. It...

articles.title: Solana ETF Could Push SOL Price to $1,300, Threatening Ether’s Market Standing
articles.description: Solana is primed for a price explosion following reports of an incoming ETF tracking its native asset, but approval for spot ETFs could send prices through the roof.

articles.title: U.S. spot ETH ETFs delayed; SEC asks for resubmission of S-1 forms by July 8
articles.description: According to Eric Balchunas, senior ETF analyst for Bloomberg, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has asked prospective spot Ethereum exchange-traded funds (ETFs) issuers to re-file their S-1 forms by July 8. This would delay the launch of the Ethereum ETFs to mid-July or later, pushing it from its expected launch date of July […]
